title: Tcard_CI6n-H6917DE-T-OP-230630V428
description:
Caution! This update may crash rooted devices.
Please plug in charger to OTA upgrade when power is lower than 50%.
Update Version:CI6n-H6917DE-T-OP-230630V428
Upgrade content:
1.Upgraded the Android version from Android 12 to Android 13.
2.Upgraded the HiOS version from HiOS8.6.0 to HiOS13.0.0.
3.Upgraded and added some special features to improve the overall experience, including but not limited to Lightning Multi-Window, AI Gallery, Smart Network Allocation, Smart Panel, VishaPlayer, SmartScan, Screenshot, FileManager.
4.We made the OS more fluently, Discover and Have fun ：）.
Reminding:
1.Optimized system stability and performance while fixing other issues.
2.Visit the TECNO SPOT forum (TECNO SPOT) for more information.
